'''dazhocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yogin|yogin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yogin|yogin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dazhocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæzhecheth|dæzhecheth]] || [[word:dæzhechej|dæzhechej]] || [[word:dæzhechesh|dæzhechesh]] || [[word:dæzheche|dæzheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhozhochoth|dazhozhochoth]] || [[word:dazhozhochoj|dazhozhochoj]] || [[word:dazhozhochosh|dazhozhochosh]] || [[word:dazhozhocho|dazhozhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhochoth|dazhochoth]] || [[word:dazhochoj|dazhochoj]] || [[word:dazhochosh|dazhochosh]] || [[word:dazhocho|dazhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhofchoth|dazhofchoth]] || [[word:dazhofchoj|dazhofchoj]] || [[word:dazhofchosh|dazhofchosh]] || [[word:dazhofchof|dazhofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dazhochotho|dazhochotho]] || [[word:dazhochojo|dazhochojo]] || [[word:dazhochosho|dazhochosho]] || [[word:dazhochoko|dazhochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dazhochoth|dazhochoth]] || [[word:dazhochoj|dazhochoj]] || [[word:dazhochosh|dazhochosh]] || [[word:dazhocho|dazhocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dazhochothol|dazhochothol]] || [[word:dazhochojol|dazhochojol]] || [[word:dazhochoshol|dazhochoshol]] || [[word:dazhochokol|dazhochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dazhochothotho|dazhochothotho]] || [[word:dazhochojojo|dazhochojojo]] || [[word:dazhochoshosho|dazhochoshosho]] || [[word:dazhochoko|dazhochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dazhochothon|dazhochothon]] || [[word:dazhochojon|dazhochojon]] || [[word:dazhochoshon|dazhochoshon]] || [[word:dazhochokon|dazhochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dazhochothoro|dazhochothoro]] || [[word:dazhochojoro|dazhochojoro]] || [[word:dazhochoshoro|dazhochoshoro]] || [[word:dazhochokoro|dazhochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
